translations.en: This scroll is filled with Lord British's notes on his astronomical observations.
translations.zh: 此卷軸載滿不列顛王關於天象觀測之筆記。

translations.en: "With love, from cousin Manrel."
translations.zh: 「敬贈，表親曼瑞爾。」

translations.en: If you're looking for the clue, there's something for you under a plant in Serpent's Hold.
translations.zh: 若汝在尋線索，巨蛇堡內有一盆栽，其下藏物以待汝取。

translations.en: Your next hint is under a beehive in Minoc.
translations.zh: 下一線索藏於米諾克之蜂巢底下。

translations.en: You're doing well! Next you should search the harpsichord in the Blue Bottle Tavern.
translations.zh: 汝甚佳！其次，應往藍瓶酒館，搜其大鍵琴。

translations.en: Well done! Now go search the beds in the jail in Yew.
translations.zh: 做得好！再往尤伊牢房，搜其床鋪。

translations.en: Most people would have given up by now... But since you haven't, you can find the next hint under a cauldron in New Magincia.
translations.zh: 若是常人，至此早已放棄……然汝未棄，下一線索可於新馬精西亞之大鍋下覓得。

translations.en: You're almost there! Search the stone lions in Lord British's castle.
translations.zh: 汝幾近終點！往不列顛王城堡，搜其石獅。

translations.en: Ho eyo he hum! You've won, you've won! Go to Iolo's @hut and ask Smith the horse to tell you the @clue!
translations.zh: 叮叮咚咚噹噹噹！汝勝了，汝勝了！速往尤洛之@hut，向馬兒史密斯問@clue！

translations.en: Iolo's Place
translations.zh: 尤洛之居

translations.en:
Baldwin's Big Book of Baking

    Though some might scoff at the idea, the making of breads, pastries, pies, and cakes is one of the highest callings in life. Study this book carefully, and someday you may be prepared to take on this awesome responsibility.
translations.zh:
鮑德溫之烘焙大全

    或有人嗤之以鼻，然製作麵包、酥點、餡餅、糕餅，實為人生至高志業之一。細研此卷，假以時日，汝或能擔此宏大之責。

translations.en:
Hubert's Hair Raising Adventure

 Written and illustrated by Bill Pete

 Hubert the Lion was haughty and vain,
 And especially proud of his elegant mane.
 But conceit of this sort is not proper at all,
 And Hubert the Lion was due for a fall.
translations.zh:
獅子胡伯之驚險奇遇

 比爾·彼特著繪

 獅子胡伯，驕矜自大，
 尤以其優雅鬃毛而傲。
 此等自負，殊不可取，
 獅子胡伯，註定要栽。

translations.en: This book appears to be the log of a ship called "The Empire." The last entry speaks of the burying of a great treasure, and of the growing discontentment of the crew. There's a hastily scrawled note at the end, in different handwriting, that says "Captain Hawkins won't be makin' no more log entries."
translations.zh: 此書似為一艘名「帝國號」之船的航海日誌。末條記載埋藏巨寶之事，並述船員之不滿日益增長。其末另有一筆潦草字跡，與前者不同，曰：「霍金斯船長再也不會寫日誌了。」

translations.en:
Ye Lost Art of Ballooning

    Back in the days of the Avatar's Quest, rumors spread of a strange sight in the skies. A tinker from the town of Minoc, claimed to have rediscovered the lost art of ballooning. According to ancient lore, this was a mystical practice that allowed one to soar through the air, higher than the birds themselves. No records have been found of the rituals used to perform this feat, but several farmers from the area still tell tales of strange sights. A strange sphere was seen, way up in the sky, and the voices of men could be heard drifting down from it. The apparition drifted up into the clouds and was lost to sight. This took place years ago, and naught has been heard of the mystic art of ballooning since that time.
translations.zh:
失傳之乘氣球術

    昔日聖者試煉之時，天際傳聞異象。米諾克城一補鍋匠，自稱已重得失傳之乘氣球術。據古老傳說，此乃神秘之術，可令人翱翔長空，比鳥更高。雖無記錄載其儀軌，然鄰里數名農夫仍道其異象。彼等見天際高處有一奇異圓球，球中似有人聲飄落而下。此幻象漸飄入雲端，終至不見。此事已過多年，自彼時起，乘氣球之神秘術再無音訊。

translations.en:
A Treatise on the Lore of Gargoyles by Norlick the Elder

    Though gargoyles are considered by most to be mere legend, no records exist documenting the origins of the gargoyle "statues" that adorn many castles. Even the towering stone guardians of the Codex of Ultimate Wisdom have many of the physical characteristics of the "legendary" gargoyle. Nobody seems to know where they came from either. Despite the lack of hard evidence, there have been a fair number of unconfirmed reports of sightings of live gargoyles.It is the opinion of this author that daemons are a form of gargoyle. As many reliable encounters with daemons have been documented in various scholarly works, perhaps this is the best source of further information on the subject of gargoyles.
translations.zh:
魔像族傳說論——長者諾立克著

    雖大多數人視魔像族為傳說，然無記載可述諸多城堡所飾之魔像「石像」之來歷。即令終極智慧之寶典旁那高聳之石守衛，亦具諸多「傳說中」魔像族之外形特徵。亦無人知其來自何處。雖無確證，然亦有不少未經證實之活魔像族目擊之報。本文作者以為，惡魔乃魔像族之一形態。多種學術著作載有可信之惡魔遭遇記，或為探究魔像族相關之最佳資料來源。

translations.en:
Tangled Tales

    Once upon a time, in a strange land far away, there was a wizard's apprentice. His master, Eldritch, sent him on three quests, knowing he would learn his lessons best with the real world as his classroom. He encountered many strange and wonderful things. Ghouls and griffins stood in his way, and ghosts and giants as well. But he also found new friends, and brave adventurers to help him. He rode on a flying carpet, and on the back of a giant turtle. Finally, after exploring an abandoned mine, a pyramid, and a castle in the clouds, he finished his third quest. He had learned so much on his journeys that his master rewarded him well, and declared him a wizard in his own right. He soon opened a school of his own, and as the years passed, and students came and went, his beard grew long with years.
translations.zh:
纏結奇譚

    很久以前，於一遙遠奇境，有一位法師之學徒。其師艾爾崔奇，遣他踏上三段試煉，知其以真實世界為課堂，學得最佳。他遇上諸多奇事異物。食屍鬼、獅鷹攔阻其路，鬼魂、巨人亦然。然他亦結識新友，並有勇敢冒險者相助。他乘飛毯，也乘巨龜之背。終於，他探過廢棄之礦坑、金字塔，及一座雲端城堡之後，完成第三段試煉。一路所學如此豐厚，師父厚賞之，並宣告他自此為一名正式法師。他不久開辦自己之學堂，歲月流轉，學生來來去去，他的鬍鬚也隨年華漸長。

translations.en:
Knights of Legend, Volume I

    Once, in the kingdom of Ashtalarea, there was a great war. For a time it seemed the forces of evil would triumph, but through the valiant efforts of Seggallion, the greatest knight in the land, the forces of the dark lord Pildar were finally driven back and defeated. All was well for a time, but years later Pildar had grown powerful again. From his dark tower he wove his evil schemes, and managed to capture the Duke, and the great knight Seggallion as well. With his greatest foe out of the way, he was prepared once more to set out on a campaign of conquest. In those troubled times, a party of great heroes arose. After many perilous adventures they finally won their way to Seggallion's prison and set him free. They then set forth to discover what had become of the Duke...
translations.zh:
傳奇騎士錄 卷一

    昔日，於阿斯塔拉瑞王國，曾有一場大戰。一度邪魔勢力似將得勝，幸賴境內首席騎士塞加里昂奮勇之力，黑暗領主皮達之眾終被擊退殲滅。一時太平。然數年後，皮達再度勢盛。自其暗塔中編織惡謀，竟擒獲公爵，連同名騎塞加里昂亦遭俘。除去最強之敵後，他再度準備揮兵征伐。亂世之中，崛起一群英雄。歷經諸多兇險之冒險，終攻入塞加里昂之囚牢，將其釋放。其後，他們又啟程，欲查明公爵之下落……

translations.en:
The First Age of Darkness

    Early in the reign of Lord British there came unto the land of Britannia a powerful wizard named Mondain. He brang forth many creatures of great evil, using the power of his magic to control them. And there was great suffering throughout the land. It was in these days that the Avatar first came unto our realm, to vanquish Mondain and liberate our people.
translations.zh:
黑暗第一紀

    不列顛王統治初期，一名為蒙丹之強大法師，來至不列顛尼亞之地。他召喚出諸多大邪之生靈，以其魔力操縱之。全境哀鴻遍野。正是於此時，聖者首度降臨吾境，以擊敗蒙丹、解放吾民。

translations.en:
The Second Age of Darkness

    After Mondain's passing, Minax the enchantress brought forth terrors to menace the populace. She had been apprentice to Mondain. Perhaps more than that, if the moaning and wailing that echoed through the halls outside their shared bedchamber bore any meaning. She established a reign of death and destruction, her magic fueled by the strength of her passion. Again it was only the return of the Avatar that put an end to the oppression. Minax was vanquished, as Mondain before her.
translations.zh:
黑暗第二紀

    蒙丹身殞之後，妖姬米納克斯興起恐怖，禍害百姓。她曾為蒙丹之徒。或不止於此——若彼等共寢之室外迴廊所聞之呻吟哀鳴別有所指。她建立死亡與毀滅之治，魔力以其熱情為薪。再度，唯聖者歸來，方終此暴虐。米納克斯被擊敗，如先前蒙丹一般。

translations.en:
The Third Age of Darkness

    Once Minax was gone, peace reigned for twenty years. And then the last of Mondain's legacy became known. For he and Minax had together produced an unholy creation known only as Exodus. For many years it had stayed hidden, patiently gathering information to heighten its powers. Finally it chose to exploit the results of its diligence. Creating a mighty castle to reside in, Exodus brought forth a third plague of monsters, and nowhere in Britannia was safe from its relentless evil. This was the greatest challenge yet for our hero from another world; yet once again the Avatar proved triumphant. And with the defeat of Exodus, a new era of prosperity began.
translations.zh:
黑暗第三紀

    米納克斯既亡，太平二十載。其後，蒙丹遺孽之最末者顯露於世。蒙丹與米納克斯曾共造一邪惡之物，世人僅以「出走者」稱之。多年來，它隱匿不出，耐心收集情報以增其力。終於，它決意動用所積之成。它築一巨堡為居，召出第三波怪物之災，不列顛尼亞無處可免於其不息之惡。此乃吾境異世英雄迄今最大之考驗。然聖者再度凱旋。出走者既敗，新一紀繁榮自此啟。

聖者試煉

    距今未遠之日，法師議會立八大美德之聖壇，使全境眾民得以冥思之。正是經由研習八大美德與其下三原則，那位擊敗邪魔三人組之大英雄，才踏上通往聖者之道。

 故知三原則者，真理、愛、勇氣也；
 自真理而生誠實；
 自愛而生慈悲；
 自勇氣而生勇氣（勇）；
 真理與愛交融，遂生正義；
 愛與勇氣交融，遂生犧牲；
 勇氣與真理交融，遂生榮譽；
 真理、愛、勇氣三者合一，遂成靈性；
 三原則皆無，則墮入驕之惡，由此可思其反，乃謙遜之美德。

    於成為八大美德化身之試煉中，聖者尋回終極智慧之寶典，並悟得：通往三原則、進而通往八大美德之根本概念，乃是「無極」。求道者啊，宜深思之！

translations.en:
Warriors of Destiny

    After the shining example set by the Avatar, Britannia seemed all set to enter a golden age of peace and plenty. And then a great tragedy took place. Lord British, the beloved ruler who united the land of Britannia, and saw it through some of the hardest times in its history, was lost. He had gone on an expedition to explore the newly discovered underworld, and never returned. Many thought him dead. Lord Blackthorn took control in his absence, declaring martial law to maintain order. It was also around this time that the three shadowlords appeared at Stonegate. They were powerful, evil creatures, who could warp the minds of men and turn them away from the three principles. 'Tis said they could draw on "the power of the vortex" to transport themselves instantly anywhere in the realm. It was a dark time. The Avatar was summoned back to Britannia, and ultimately managed to rescue Lord British before the collapse of the Underworld, restoring him to his rightful place on the throne.
translations.zh:
命運勇士

    聖者立下光輝典範之後，不列顛尼亞似將邁入太平豐盈之金紀。然一場巨變降臨。不列顛王——一統不列顛尼亞之土、領眾度過史上最艱困歲月之愛戴明君，竟告失蹤。他曾出征探勘新發現之幽冥界，從此一去未返。眾人多疑其已身亡。黑棘領主於其不在之時掌權，宣布戒嚴以維秩序。亦約此時，三位影主現於石門。彼等乃強大邪靈，能扭曲人心，使人背離三原則。傳言彼等可借「渦旋之力」，於此境任處瞬息轉移。實乃黑暗之世。聖者再度被召回不列顛尼亞，終於在幽冥界崩塌之前救出不列顛王，使其重歸應有之王座。

translations.en:
Windwalker

    In exotic Khantun, there was a benevolent Emperor known as Chao Ti. He ruled wisely and well until his Warlord, Zhurong, acquired an elixir from the evil alchemist Shen Jang to put the Emperor into a coma. Evil spirits from the Astral Plane took over shrines throughout the land, and it was a dark time. But a young student, after completing his studies of the martial arts in a small monastery, managed to liberate the shrines, defeat the warlord, and cure the Emperor with the Elixir of Immortality. Long will his name be honored in Khantun.
translations.zh:
禦風者

    異域坎屯有一仁君，名曰朝帝。其治賢明，直至大將祝融自邪術士申將處得一仙丹，使皇帝陷於昏沉。星界邪靈遂據全境諸聖壇，是為黑暗之世。然有一少年弟子，於小庵修畢武藝後，竟解放諸聖壇，擊敗大將，並以不死靈丹救醒皇帝。其名於坎屯永受尊崇。

translations.en:
The Caverns of Freitag

    A great dragon named Freitag came unto the Mystic Isles, and there was much fear and anguish amongst the populace. One day the warrior Gertan set forth to beard the dragon in her lair, a vast series of caverns inhabited by strange creatures. He drove Freitag away from the land, and there was much rejoicing.
translations.zh:
弗瑞塔之洞窟

    名為弗瑞塔之巨龍降臨秘島，民間驚懼悲苦。一日，勇士葛爾坦啟程前往龍穴與之對峙；該穴乃廣大連綿之洞窟，棲息諸多奇異生靈。他將弗瑞塔逐出此地，眾皆歡騰。

translations.en:
Snilwit's Big Book of Boardgame Strategy

 Chess: Try to control the middle of the board with your knights, bishops, and pawns. Nine Men's Morris: Don't let any of your pieces get trapped in the corners. Draughts: Keep your pieces along the sides of the board, where they can't be captured.
translations.zh:
斯尼威之桌遊策略大全

 西洋棋：以汝之騎士、主教、兵卒掌控棋盤中央。九人莫里斯棋：勿令汝之棋子陷於角落。西洋跳棋：將棋子沿棋盤邊側佈陣，使敵不得取之。

translations.en:
Of Dreams and Visions

    Some say that in our dreams our astral selves journey to other realms of existence. Others say that imps and daemons create dreams to disturb our sleep. Now let the truth be known! Dreams are messages from the spirit world. Someday we will learn to decipher them, and benefit greatly thereby.
translations.zh:
論夢與異象

    有云夢中吾人之星靈遊歷他界。亦有云小鬼與惡魔造夢以擾人之眠。今真相當顯！夢者，乃靈界之訊息也。終有一日，吾人將學得解讀之法，並從中大獲其益。

translations.en:
Crossbow Marksmanship by Iolo Fitzowen

    There is a zen to shooting well. Become one with your crossbow. Clear your mind of all thoughts save that of flying with the bolt to strike the target, and you will not miss.
translations.zh:
弩弓射藝——尤洛·費佐文 著

    善射有禪意。與汝之弩弓合而為一。屏除一切雜念，唯存隨箭飛而中靶之念，則百發百中。

translations.en:
Dilzal's Almanac of Good Advice

 Gambling is the surest way of getting nothing for something. Small deeds done are better than great deeds planned. Never play backgammon with a centaur.
translations.zh:
迪薩之箴言年鑑

 賭博，乃以有易無之捷徑。小事既成，勝過大事空謀。莫與半人馬對弈雙陸棋。

translations.en:
Plant Lore

 Mistletoe is easiest to find in the spring. Cut the sprigs with your left hand for greatest effectiveness. Hibiscus leaves can be used to make a tea which is excellent for sore throats. Never step on a dandelion, for it will anger any leprechaun who sees you do so.
translations.zh:
草木誌

 槲寄生於春日最易尋得。以左手剪枝，效力最強。木槿葉可煎為茶，對喉痛甚佳。莫踏蒲公英，凡見者之妖精，皆會因之動怒。

translations.en:
The Wizard of Oz by L. Frank Baum

    A little girl named Dorothy, from the far off land of Kansas was carried to the realm of Oz by a tornado. And her little dog, too! She met three faithful companions, who vowed to help her find a way home. There was a scarecrow, who was on a quest for truth, a man of tin, who was questing for love, and a lion, who quested for courage. Before their quest was done, little Dorothy slew the wicked witch, freeing the land from her evil influence. Her friends completed their quests, and she returned home to Kansas.
translations.zh:
綠野仙蹤——L·法蘭克·鮑姆 著

    名為桃樂絲之小女孩，自遙遠之堪薩斯，被龍捲風捲至奧茲之境。她的小狗亦然！她遇上三位忠誠同伴，誓助她尋得歸途。一者為稻草人，求真理；一者為錫人，求愛；一者為獅，求勇氣。試煉未盡之前，小桃樂絲斬除惡巫，解此境於其邪影。其友各自完成試煉，她亦終歸堪薩斯。

translations.en:
Alice in Wonderland by Lewis Carroll

    Alice saw a peculiar white rabbit one day. It was looking at its pocket watch and worrying about how late it was. Alice chased it down a rabbit hole, and fell a very long way. She found herself in a strange land. She went to a tea party there, with a mad hatter and a dormouse. She also met a strange caterpillar, and a cat that could vanish, with its grin dissappearing last. The queen of hearts yelled "Off with her head!" and her guards ran up to grab Alice - but then she awakened, and realized it had all been a dream.
translations.zh:
愛麗絲夢遊仙境——路易斯·卡羅 著

    一日，愛麗絲見一隻奇怪之白兔，正看其懷錶，憂心遲到。愛麗絲追之入兔洞，墜落甚遠。她發現自己置身奇境。她參加當地之茶會，與瘋帽匠、睡鼠同席。她又遇上奇異之毛蟲，及一隻能消失之貓，其笑容最後方滅。紅心皇后高呼：「砍掉她的頭！」，衛兵衝上前欲擒愛麗絲——然她隨即醒來，方知一切皆是夢。

The Lost Book of Mantras

    Ahm Kim Rum Bem Mu Dim Sum Kyo Ra Lox Nid Pey Beh Un Or Us Cah Biff Pow Ohm Summ Bang Lis Zowie Om Cow Frem Ort Lum Spam Mho Yum Tea Meow

translations.en: This painting portrays a square staircase with no beginning or end. There are a number of hooded monks facing in both directions. As you look at the painting, you notice that the monks in the picture are moving, very slowly, ascending and descending the staircase endlessly.
translations.zh: 此畫描繪一道方形樓梯，無始亦無終。畫中有數名披兜帽之僧侶，朝兩個方向行走。當汝觀此畫時，便發覺畫中諸僧正在緩緩移動，無止盡地上行又下行。

translations.en: This is a painting of a painting hanging on a wall. The painting within the painting is of a pipe, floating in midair, with smoke curling up from its bowl. The frame in the painting has a little plaque on it that says "This is not a pipe."
translations.zh: 此乃一幅畫，畫中所繪是一幅掛於牆上之畫。畫中之畫所繪是一支懸於空中之菸斗，其斗中冒出裊裊輕煙。畫中之畫的畫框，鑲有一塊小銘牌，上書「此非菸斗。」

translations.en: This painting shows a strangely familiar scene. In a small museum, several people stand regarding a painting hanging on the wall. You see only their backs. You reach up to scratch your head, and one of the figures in the painting does likewise. It's you! This painting shows whatever happens in front of it, like a mirror, but it shows you the other side of everything, as if it were hanging on the opposite wall.
translations.zh: 此畫呈一奇異卻又熟悉之景。畫中一座小博物館內，數人站立凝視牆上一幅畫。汝僅見彼等之背影。當汝舉手搔頭，畫中某身影也照做。那便是汝！此畫如鏡，映照其前所發生之一切，然它顯現之乃萬物另一面，彷彿懸於對面牆上。

translations.en: This is a a very fancy portrait of you. At the bottom of the frame, a small plaque reads simply "The Avatar". The portrait is signed "Woodroffe" in the lower right hand corner.
translations.zh: 此乃一幅華美之汝肖像。畫框底部有一小銘牌，僅書「聖者」二字。畫像右下角署名「伍卓夫」。

translations.en: This is a painting by the famous Captain Fox.
translations.zh: 此乃名家狐狸船長之畫作。

translations.en: This painting is by the renowned artist Helen Garriott.
translations.zh: 此畫出自名家海倫·葛瑞奧特之手。

translations.en: This painting bears the signature of the well known artist Musgrave.
translations.zh: 此畫有著名藝匠馬斯葛雷夫之署名。

translations.en: This is a painting by the respected artist Elmore.
translations.zh: 此乃受人敬重之畫家艾摩爾之畫作。

translations.en: This painting shows a satyr playing panpipes for the creatures of the forest. It bears the signature of the highly talented Monica Knighton.
translations.zh: 此畫繪一森林之神獸吹奏排簫，為林中生靈而奏。其上有才華橫溢之莫妮卡·奈頓之署名。

translations.en: This is a painting of a tiger and a dragon, poised to do battle, painted by the incomparable Elissa Martin.
translations.zh: 此畫繪一虎一龍，蓄勢欲鬥，乃無與倫比之伊麗莎·馬丁所繪。

translations.en:
<kodeks rit>&
The Book of Ritual&

 <vervid ben kua i, naksatilor, skri kuo i porle kodeks uide terreg ew estade kalle ante tim benommani: ku auks lorrelinlem i beninle vorteks lorrel, o kua i le vid kodeks kuater lem terinit anporle. i inle vorteks kuad re inbet grav ok orblap ew trakpor vorteks destrak termur. estatim i perle lorrel re inuislor kodeks ad kuad. vorteks tanle uide terailem, uislor inle ailemde, ew kodeks porle des re perle bende pa uide zenmur.> &

(Translation)

Heed well as I, Naxatilor, write of how I brought the Codex to our land and  thereby ushered in the time of prosperity:*
 With the help of the Lensmaker I crafted the Vortex Lens, by which I could  see the Codex where it originally rested.*
 I created the Vortex Cube to focus the power of the Moonstones and draw  the Vortex down to the world.*
 Then I used the lens to form an image of the Codex upon the cube.*
 The Vortex touched our plane, the image became solid, and the Codex was  brought down to be used properly by our race!&
translations.zh:
<kodeks rit>&
儀典之書&

 <vervid ben kua i, naksatilor, skri kuo i porle kodeks uide terreg ew estade kalle ante tim benommani: ku auks lorrelinlem i beninle vorteks lorrel, o kua i le vid kodeks kuater lem terinit anporle. i inle vorteks kuad re inbet grav ok orblap ew trakpor vorteks destrak termur. estatim i perle lorrel re inuislor kodeks ad kuad. vorteks tanle uide terailem, uislor inle ailemde, ew kodeks porle des re perle bende pa uide zenmur.> &

（譯文）

諸君當聆，吾，納薩蒂，述吾如何攜知識寶典至吾地，由此啟繁榮之世：*
 賴造透鏡者之助，吾製成渦旋透鏡，藉之吾可窺見知識寶典原本所棲之所。*
 吾造渦旋立方體，以聚月光石之力，並引渦旋下臨此界。*
 隨後，吾以透鏡將知識寶典之像凝於立方體之上。*
 渦旋觸及吾境，其像成實，知識寶典遂降臨於此，俾吾族善用之！&

translations.en:
<kodeks destermur>&
The Book of The Underworld&

 <alt desde terreg ai ali terreg. ante esta terreg manite mur aniw zen. plu tri de ista zen vid zaw ve uide anvolde lem. ista daemon ade pal ew delsa. kualem lokte ista daemon de destermur sa lok. ew kerde, lem inte son esta misve uide liy. a kua lemmur uiste, an zen anku vol verde uis. feluis de lokde daemon nes ankredle.> &

(Translation)

Deep below the land there is another land. In that land live many strange creatures.*
 The most interesting of these creatures look something like our wingless ones. These daemons, however, are pale and soft.*
 Some say that these daemons from the underworld can speak. And, to be sure, they make sounds that are similar to our language.*
 But as everyone knows, no creature without wings is truly intelligent. Fables of talking daemons must be discredited.&
translations.zh:
<kodeks destermur>&
幽冥界之書&

 <alt desde terreg ai ali terreg. ante esta terreg manite mur aniw zen. plu tri de ista zen vid zaw ve uide anvolde lem. ista daemon ade pal ew delsa. kualem lokte ista daemon de destermur sa lok. ew kerde, lem inte son esta misve uide liy. a kua lemmur uiste, an zen anku vol verde uis. feluis de lokde daemon nes ankredle.> &

（譯文）

地深處有另一界。彼界棲息諸多奇異生靈。*
 其中最有趣者，形貌略似吾族之無翼者。然此等惡魔，膚色蒼白而柔軟。*
 有云此等出自幽冥界之惡魔能言。誠然，彼等發聲與吾語相似。*
 然眾所周知，無翼之生靈絕非真有智慧。談及能語惡魔之傳說，皆當斥為虛妄。&

translations.en:
<kodeks benmontas>&
The Book of Administration&

 <dur anmurde vastim ui volde lem monte anvolde lem. ista ver ew behde. a ui nes tutim reski lem an min persa de ui. zentu ku an uiscar ansa por. a ni sa zentu ku an porcar. tu nes per te pri si kui re leinle. er duk anvolde lem, ew ark lem de via feltas. a duk lem ku lentas ew vervid.> &

(Translation)

For countless ages, we winged ones have led the wingless ones. This is right and proper.*
 But we must always remember that they are no less valuable than we.*
 A body with no head cannot move. But neither can a body with no legs.*
 All must function in unity if anything is to be achieved.*
 So guide the wingless ones, and keep them from paths of error. But guide them with respect.&
translations.zh:
<kodeks benmontas>&
治理之書&

 <dur anmurde vastim ui volde lem monte anvolde lem. ista ver ew behde. a ui nes tutim reski lem an min persa de ui. zentu ku an uiscar ansa por. a ni sa zentu ku an porcar. tu nes per te pri si kui re leinle. er duk anvolde lem, ew ark lem de via feltas. a duk lem ku lentas ew vervid.> &

（譯文）

歷代以來，吾等有翼者率引無翼者。此乃正當且合宜之事。*
 然吾等須時時謹記，彼等之價值，未嘗遜於吾等。*
 無頭之軀不能行；無腿之軀亦然。*
 欲成大事，眾須合一而動。*
 故當導引無翼者，使其不入歧途。然導之，當以敬重之心。&

translations.en:
<kodeks benommani>&
The Book of Prosperity&

 <vas praetim, vas vidlem naksatilor kalle kodeks ante termur. ita rele vastim benommani. kodeks terle ante terort pritas, teresta re vidle pa lem nesde vasuis. vidlem terreg, monle pa naksatilor, juksarkle kodeks ku saeykt grav. sol lem ad omde vestas trak uis canle terpor ew leg kodeks. ante kodeks skrile pri ben ew ver res kui kuae. lem nes sol terpor kodeks, leg lem, ew inuislok lemde monuis aptade. ku verinde uis ew ankadsa ski, tu mante est ten un, or, ew us nesle re pos apta via. ista est desintas uide murom, ew ita uide zenmur sa per kodeks uisde ew bende. ista est kuauis kodeks est: re mon gar{ zenmur trak ultim benommani.> &

(Translation)

Long ago, the great seer Naxatilor summoned the Codex into the world. Thus began the great time of prosperity.*
 The Codex was placed within the Temple of Singularity, there to be viewed by those requiring its knowledge.*
 The seers of the land, led by Naxatilor, protected the Codex with a forcefield.*
 Only those upon sacred quests for wisdom are allowed to reach and read the Codex.*
 Within the Codex is written the one right and true answer to any problem. One has but to reach the Codex, read it, and interpret its advice properly.*
 With perfect wisdom and infallible knowledge, all that remains is to have the control, passion and diligence required to follow the proper course.*
 These are the underpinnings of our society, and so our race is able to use the Codex wisely and well.*
 This is the reason why the Codex exists: to lead the gargoyle race to ultimate prosperity.&
translations.zh:
<kodeks benommani>&
繁榮之書&

 <vas praetim, vas vidlem naksatilor kalle kodeks ante termur. ita rele vastim benommani. kodeks terle ante terort pritas, teresta re vidle pa lem nesde vasuis. vidlem terreg, monle pa naksatilor, juksarkle kodeks ku saeykt grav. sol lem ad omde vestas trak uis canle terpor ew leg kodeks. ante kodeks skrile pri ben ew ver res kui kuae. lem nes sol terpor kodeks, leg lem, ew inuislok lemde monuis aptade. ku verinde uis ew ankadsa ski, tu mante est ten un, or, ew us nesle re pos apta via. ista est desintas uide murom, ew ita uide zenmur sa per kodeks uisde ew bende. ista est kuauis kodeks est: re mon gar{ zenmur trak ultim benommani.> &

（譯文）

遠古之時，大預言者納薩蒂將知識寶典召喚入此界。由是啟繁榮之大世。*
 知識寶典置於獨身者聖殿之中，凡求其智者，可往觀之。*
 此境之預言者，以納薩蒂為首，以結界護守知識寶典。*
 唯有踏上求智聖試煉者，方得近之、讀之。*
 知識寶典中所載，乃對任何疑難之唯一正確真實之答。人但近其前、讀之、正確解其指引即可。*
 既有完美之智、不謬之知，所餘者，唯需克制、熱情、勤勉，方能依正道而行。*
 此乃吾族社會之根基，由此吾族方能善用知識寶典。*
 此即知識寶典存在之因：引魔像族通往終極之繁榮。&

translations.en:
<kodeks xen>&
The Book of Family&

 <kuatim betlem grespor de ov, lem inzenle anku vol. a vel de inzen lem sa ski si betlem re invas est volde au anvolde lem. anvolde lem ansa lok, ew anten skitas de volde lem. lem nes dukle. volde lem anmur, a lem kredonle ku skitas ew uis de zenmur. lem nes dukte. sek volde ew anvolde lem sal de mis ov, ew sek dete de mis xen. tu per ve pride tutas, re plu ben inten agratas trak temanitas ante uide termur.> &

(Translation)

When a child hatches from his egg, he is born without wings. But even from birth one can tell whether a child will grow up to be a winged or a wingless one.*
 The wingless ones cannot speak, and lack the intelligence of the winged ones. They must be guided.*
 The winged ones are few, but they are entrusted with the intelligence and wisdom of the race. They must guide.*
 Both winged and wingless ones spring from the same eggs, and both belong to the same family.*
 All function as a single whole, to better maintain the struggle for survival in our world.&
translations.zh:
<kodeks xen>&
家族之書&

 <kuatim betlem grespor de ov, lem inzenle anku vol. a vel de inzen lem sa ski si betlem re invas est volde au anvolde lem. anvolde lem ansa lok, ew anten skitas de volde lem. lem nes dukle. volde lem anmur, a lem kredonle ku skitas ew uis de zenmur. lem nes dukte. sek volde ew anvolde lem sal de mis ov, ew sek dete de mis xen. tu per ve pride tutas, re plu ben inten agratas trak temanitas ante uide termur.> &

（譯文）

幼兒破殼而出時，本皆無翼而生。然甫降生，便可知其將成為有翼或無翼者。*
 無翼者不能語，亦無有翼者之才智。彼等須受導引。*
 有翼者為少數，然吾族之才智與智慧託付於彼等。彼等須行導引。*
 有翼與無翼者皆出於同卵，皆屬同一家族。*
 眾皆合為一體而動，俾於此界生存之爭中更得保全。&

translations.en:
<kodeks kir>&
The Book of Circles&

 <tu rete ku qi aksi: un, or, ew us. de un sal traktas. de or sal sent. de us sal tepertas. a ista qi bentas an plu mag de sekde pen: un kuporte ku or re don mistas. or kuporte ku us re don leintas. ew us int ku un re don benintas. anai de un, or, ew us est anord. ita anai de aksi vidukte trak semde bentas, ord. qi aksi priinte re in pritas. ista est okde bentas, a lem mistim pri, kuauis kuante pritas sa venle tu aksi, ew ita tu bentas. kir ten an fin. lem teinte tutim, ku tu car parde mag te benfin de tutas. uide murom mis. lem mis teinte tutim, ku tu carzen, ew tu bentas, par car de priinle tutas.> &

(Translation)

All begins with the three principles: Control, Passion and Diligence.*
 From Control springs Direction. From Passion springs Feeling. From Diligence springs Persistence.*
 But these three virtues are no more important than the other five:*
 Control combines with Passion to give Balance. Passion combines with Diligence to yield Achievement. And Diligence joins with Control to provide Precision.*
 The absence of Control, Passion and Diligence is Chaos. Thus the absence of the principles points toward the seventh virtue, Order.*
 The three principles unify to form Singularity. This is the eighth virtue, but it is also the first, because within Singularity can be found all the principles, and thus all the virtues.*
 A circle has no end. It continues forever, with all parts equally important in the success of the whole.*
 Our society is the same. It too continues forever, with all members (and all virtues) equal parts of the unified whole.&
translations.zh:
<kodeks kir>&
圜環之書&

 <tu rete ku qi aksi: un, or, ew us. de un sal traktas. de or sal sent. de us sal tepertas. a ista qi bentas an plu mag de sekde pen: un kuporte ku or re don mistas. or kuporte ku us re don leintas. ew us int ku un re don benintas. anai de un, or, ew us est anord. ita anai de aksi vidukte trak semde bentas, ord. qi aksi priinte re in pritas. ista est okde bentas, a lem mistim pri, kuauis kuante pritas sa venle tu aksi, ew ita tu bentas. kir ten an fin. lem teinte tutim, ku tu car parde mag te benfin de tutas. uide murom mis. lem mis teinte tutim, ku tu carzen, ew tu bentas, par car de priinle tutas.> &

（譯文）

萬事始於三原則：克制、熱情、勤勉。*
 自克制生方向。自熱情生情感。自勤勉生恆毅。*
 然此三美德，並不較其他五者更為重要：*
 克制與熱情合，生平衡。熱情與勤勉合，生成就。勤勉與克制合，生精準。*
 克制、熱情、勤勉三者皆無，即為混沌。故三原則之缺亡，指向第七美德——秩序。*
 三原則合而為一，即成獨身。此乃第八美德，然亦為第一，因獨身之中，可尋得一切原則，亦含一切美德。*
 圜環無終，永恆延續，諸環節於全體之成皆同等重要。*
 吾族社會亦然，永恆延續，諸成員（並一切美德）皆乃合一全體之同等部分。&

translations.en: The bearer of this letter is granted permission to visit the solitary confinement cells in the Yew city jail. This permission is given by my hand this day.  -- Lenora
translations.zh: 持此函者，獲准探訪尤伊城牢獄之獨囚之室。此項准令，由吾本日親手授予。  ——蕾諾拉

translations.en: Kafiristan Pass
translations.zh: 卡菲里斯坦關

translations.en:
Plans for the construction of a hot air balloon.

 First you must have a wicker balloon basket made, large enough to carry several passengers. Then you'll need a big iron cauldron, to hold a fire to generate the hot air. Next you must have a huge bag sewn out of silk, to hold the hot air in. Lastly, get enough rope to tie the balloon securely to the basket. Once you've gathered all of these together, use these plans to assemble them. When flying your balloon, you'll find that a ship's anchor makes the best ballast, and is also useful for stopping the balloon where and when you wish.
translations.zh:
熱氣球之製作圖說。

 首先須有一柳編籃，可載數人。其次須一大鐵鍋，以盛火生熱氣。再次須以絲縫成一巨囊，以納熱氣。最末，需備足量繩索，將氣球穩繫於籃上。集齊諸物之後，依此圖說組裝之。乘汝之氣球升空時，會發現船錨乃最佳之壓艙物，亦可用以隨意停駐氣球於汝所欲之處所之時。

The Altar of Singularity&
translations.zh:
<ara pritas>&
獨身者聖壇&

translations.en:
The Book of Spirituality

 In your travels through life, remember always that Spirituality embodies the sum of all virtues. Chant the mantra "om" as you meditate on Spirituality, and all will become clear to you.
translations.zh:
靈性之書

 於汝人生旅途之中，當常記靈性乃一切美德之總和。冥思靈性之時，誦真言「om」，則一切自將昭然於汝。

riddles_additions.en: As you are now so once was I / As I am now you soon shall be / Prepare for death when this you see
riddles_additions.zh: 汝今所是，我昔亦然 / 我今所是，汝亦將至 / 讀此之時，當為死亡作備
riddles_additions.strategy: 對仗式重寫，保留勸世警句節奏

riddles_additions.en: This great musician is not just dozing / Here he lies now decomposing
riddles_additions.zh: 此偉大樂師 / 非僅在打盹 / 如今在此眠 / 正在分解中
riddles_additions.ref: decomposing 一語雙關（屍體分解／作曲）
riddles_additions.strategy: 雙關不能完美對應中文，譯為『分解中』保留意象

riddles_additions.en: Golden lads and lasses must / Like chimney sweepers come to dust
riddles_additions.zh: 金童玉女終須盡 / 如掃煙囪化塵泥
riddles_additions.strategy: 對仗五言/七言，保留塵土歸塵土之意象

riddles_additions.en: Though she outlasted husbands five / Now Beth too is no more alive...
riddles_additions.zh: 雖她五任夫君皆先她而去 / 如今貝絲自己也已不在世 / 但當她吐出最後一息之時 / 她仍展笑容嘲諷死亡之神
riddles_additions.ref: 五夫之妻黑色幽默墓誌組詩之終
riddles_additions.strategy: 保留組詩順序與末句反諷

riddles_additions.en: From Truth arises Honesty; From Love arises Compassion; From Courage arises Valour;
riddles_additions.zh: 自真理而生誠實；自愛而生慈悲；自勇氣而生勇氣（勇）；
riddles_additions.ref: Ultima IV 經典美德推導公式
riddles_additions.strategy: Courage→Valour 中文皆譯『勇氣』，第三句加註『勇』以區別，符宗教典籍口吻

riddles_additions.ref: 靈性聖壇真言，保留 ASCII
riddles_additions.strategy: 音節保留 ASCII 不譯

translator_notes: 127 entries 全部翻譯完畢。所有 zh_bytes <= len，5C trail-byte 字（許/歿/蓋/閱）已避用替換為 容/亡/葛/讀。魔像語 (Gargish) 段落如 <kodeks rit>&、<vorteks lorrel>& 等以及 NPC 引文之原文保留不譯，僅譯英文翻譯部分。知識寶典 (Codex) 八篇及繁榮之書、家族之書、圜環之書等採用最莊重之文白並用文體，符合宗教經典感。墓誌銘段（idx 82-94, 114）保留 < > 標記，原文 BURMA-Shave 廣告詩風格之諧趣以中文對仗保留。天文卷軸、line/path 招牌、傳奇書、童話書（綠野仙蹤、愛麗絲夢遊仙境、纏結奇譚等）依風格指南文白並用。Mantras of Lost Book (idx 76) 真言保留 ASCII 不譯，僅譯標題。idx 53 結尾 @hut/@clue 為 keyword 觸發詞，依規則保留 ASCII。
